title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search releases an AI news roundup covering 25+ recent AI tools and updates. Featured tools include Pixal3D for 3D generation, Sana-WM for open-source world models, MiniCPM for vision understanding, Krea2 for creative generation, ChatGPT Finance for personal finance, and various video/audio/3D generation utilities.
